short_summary: War steady, Iran deal distracts West
rationale: Cross-border strikes continue as background reality; Iran deal stalemate keeps US diplomatic attention partially diverted, sustaining concern about Western aid continuity for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Three killed as Ukraine and Russia exchange cross-border attacks
top_events.summary: Ongoing strikes confirm war's continuation without new escalation. For Ukrainians this is daily reality — no qualitative change but lives remain at risk.

top_events.title: Trump halts attacks after Kharg Island threat; Iran deal unresolved
top_events.summary: US attention remains heavily focused on Iran diplomacy; no concrete Western aid cut to Ukraine announced, but distraction risk for Ukrainian support pipeline persists.

top_events.title: Indian sailors killed in Hormuz amid US-Iran ceasefire uncertainty
top_events.summary: Hormuz tensions highlight fragility of any Iran ceasefire; for Ukraine, a prolonged US-Iran focus risks delaying military and financial support decisions.
